phases.title: One-Sentence Summary
phases.description: Distill the central conflict and hook into one sentence you can test and revise before you expand.

phases.title: One-Paragraph Expansion
phases.description: Turn the sentence into a short paragraph covering setup, major turns, and ending shape.

phases.title: Character Core Arcs
phases.description: Sketch each lead’s goal, flaw, relationship pressure, and the change they must earn.

phases.title: One-Page Synopsis
phases.description: Expand the paragraph into a full-page synopsis of plot beats and emotional through-lines.

phases.title: Scene List
phases.description: Break the story into numbered scenes with purpose, conflict, and outcome for each.

phases.title: Scene Expansion
phases.description: Expand key scenes into beats, stakes, and what shifts by the scene’s end.

phases.title: Draft Execution
phases.description: Write the draft using the outline as a working map, revising the plan only when the story demands it.
